question: What happens when Greece's 7 percent pensioner tax expires after 15 years?
answer: The regime is capped at 15 years. On expiry there is no automatic renewal: worldwide income reverts to Greece's standard progressive rates, reaching 44 percent at the top band.

supportingFacts.label: Headline flat rate under the regime
Greece standard top personal income tax rate on reversion
What ends the regime early (annual payment catch)

rule: Greece's Article 5B flat tax is capped at 15 consecutive years. On expiry there is no automatic renewal; the taxpayer returns to standard Greek progressive rates on worldwide income, which reach 44 percent at the top band. Non-payment in any single year also ends the regime early.
